ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Full name of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosomal_location" TEXT /* Chromosomal location of the gene */,
  "functional_description" TEXT /* Functional description of the gene */,
  "ontology_info" TEXT /* Ontology information of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "pathway_description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  "ontology_info" TEXT /* Ontology information of the pathway */,
  "reactome_id" TEXT /* Reactome ID of the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_pathway" (
  "gene_pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene-pathway relationship */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the gene and pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression data point */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Expression value of the gene */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement of the expression value */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the expression value */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "design_type" TEXT /* Design type of the experiment */,
  "tissue_of_origin" TEXT /* Tissue of origin of the experiment */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Cell type of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene interaction */,
  "gene_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first gene */,
  "gene_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second gene */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction between the genes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_interactions_gene_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id_1") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_interactions_gene_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id_2") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_regulation" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory relationship */,
  "gene_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first gene */,
  "gene_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second gene */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of regulatory relationship between the genes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_regulation_gene_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id_2") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_regulation_gene_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id_1") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each gene-pathway relationship
Type of relationship between the gene and pathway
Unique identifier for each expression data point
Unit of measurement of the expression value
Data type of the expression value
Tissue of origin of the experiment
Unique identifier for each gene interaction
Type of interaction between the genes
Unique identifier for each regulatory relationship
Type of regulatory relationship between the genes
